# Buvijon

> A garden where your child's digital balance blooms. Beautiful, calm screen
> time management for families. Each child's daily screen time becomes a living
> flower that thrives with balance and wilts when limits are exceeded.

Buvijon is pre-launch. The waitlist is open. Launch date: June 1.

## Pages
- [Home](https://buvijon.com/): product overview and call to action.
- [Family dashboard](https://buvijon.com/family): shared family garden, member
  standing, chats, and per-child screen time detail (interactive preview with
  sample data).
- [Analysis](https://buvijon.com/analysis): screen time KPIs, activity, trend,
  and app breakdown (interactive preview with sample data).
- [Waitlist](https://buvijon.com/waitlist): early-access sign-up form.

## For agents
- Every page also serves Markdown: send `Accept: text/markdown` to receive a
  markdown representation (`Content-Type: text/markdown`, `x-markdown-tokens`).
- API catalog: https://buvijon.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- Health check: https://buvijon.com/api/health
- Agent skills index: https://buvijon.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- Content usage preferences are declared in https://buvijon.com/robots.txt
  (Content-Signal: ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=yes).

## Notes
- There is no public authenticated API at this time. OAuth/OIDC and MCP
  discovery documents, if present, are non-production placeholders.
